postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh && git config --global credential.helper gh && /usr/local/bin/mise trust 
  /workspaces/$DEVPOD_WORKSPACE_ID/mise.toml && /usr/local/bin/mise install && /usr/local/bin/mise reshim && chezmoi init --apply 
  https://github.com/mikefrantum/dotfiles.git
